headline: You'll own nothing, and corporations will rent it all.
subtext: Congrats, you're a tenant for life. The lords approve your perpetual lease.
image_prompt: Style: Neo-brutalist abstract data-art, high contrast, dark, cinematic. A vast, imposing scene of colossal, unyielding concrete monoliths forming an endless, labyrinthine network, stretching into an inky black abyss. Faint, cold blue abstract data-art patterns, resembling omnipresent, unbreakable digital contracts and perpetual property lines, glow subtly across their textured surfaces. A singular, tiny, almost imperceptible glowing point of light is perpetually trapped within the immense, dark grid. Dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, deep shadows. Minimalist, professional, text-free.
